compiled_state.title: CI-hook-tests: REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md contains hardcoded plugins/dso fallback path -> test-no-plugin-markdown-refs.sh fails
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
test-no-plugin-markdown-refs.sh finds 2 hardcoded plugins/dso references in plugin markdown files:
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md line 37: comment referencing plugins/dso as fallback
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md line 39: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT="$REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso" fallback assignment

## Expected Behavior
Plugin markdown files should use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} or _PLUGIN_ROOT variables, not hardcoded plugins/dso/ paths.

## Actual Behavior
REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md has a final fallback that hardcodes plugins/dso as the plugin path.

## Evidence
CI run 24319865314 (2026-04-13), Hook Tests job.
